description: Eval set for the local AI platform. Each case: query + expected workflow + optional 'expect_substrings' (any one must appear in the answer, case-insensitive).

cases.query: How many annual leave days do I get?
What is the company's sick leave policy?
I want to request three days of vacation next month.
When will I get my pay slip for this month?
What are the common side effects of ibuprofen?
What does a high blood pressure reading mean?
How is type 2 diabetes typically treated?
I need to book an appointment with a cardiologist for chest pain.
Schedule a dermatologist appointment for next week.
When is the deadline to drop a course this semester?
How do I apply for a research grant?
What's my GPA requirement to keep my scholarship?
Who is my academic advisor and how do I reach them?
